blocker_summary: Netlify builds failing with state='error' for 7 consecutive deploys since 928ac35 (Secrets refactor). All V6 code is on main, local checks all green, but production is stuck on a pre-Love-Lock build. Public deploy logs not accessible (auth required) — error_message field is empty in API responses.

1_validate_love_lock_browser.blocker: production serving stale bundle — Netlify build not deploying new code

4_onboarding_modal.note: code pushed but not deployed (Netlify fail)

7_diagnose_splash_hydration.finding: Splash doesn't hydrate because production is serving stale V5 bundle, not because of a code bug. Real fix = unblock Netlify builds.

8_diagnose_netlify_build_fail.note: Diagnosing why Netlify builds fail while local works

9_tag_v6_smoke_final.blocker: cannot tag v6.0.0 until Netlify deploys work and Love Lock is validated live

ping_reason: Netlify deploy logs are auth-gated. I can see deploy state='error' and duration ~9s (early failure), but I cannot read the actual build log to see the error. Daniel needs to either: (a) log into https://app.netlify.com/projects/presuntinho/deploys and paste the build log of the latest error, OR (b) click 'Retry deploy' on the latest error, OR (c) roll back to last green (15:44:06 deploy / commit 21cfa46) to get a working baseline, then re-apply V6 commits one by one to find the breaking one.
